MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John S. Rueppel, Esq. of O'Neil Rueppel LLP, T:415.992.3123, for plaintiff/moving party;
Russell Robinson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Russell Robinson, T:415.861.4416, for defendant/opposing party.

RULING: Hearing held. After hearing,

PLAINTIFF JUANA RODRIGUEZ' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is continued to April 23, 2018 at 9:30am. The Court ordered the parties to meet with Pang Ly on Friday, 4/20/18, at 9:30am. They are to send Ms. Ly an email and provide the Court with a status report on Monday, 4/23/18. There will be no depositions tomorrow and the Court is inclined to continue the trial date.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
